results.title: Bethlehem takes Game 1 of Section 2 Class AA baseball series
results.description: Bethlehem continued to act like anything but an eight seed on Friday, shutting out second-seeded Mohonasen 9-0 in Game 1 of the Section 2 Class AA Baseball Tournament best-of-three series Friday at Joseph L. Bruno Stadium.

results.title: PSG, Arsenal set for high-stakes Champions League final in Budapest
